column2: # Build a fast look-up for variables by code
# SCB DeSO Region values have "_DeSO2025" suffix, so we need to append it
# Function to fetch multiple ages in one request
mutate(col = vapply(Alder, age_to_col, character(1), prefix = prefix)) |>
kids_0_19 = rowSums(across(c(pop_0_4, pop_5_9, pop_10_14, pop_15_19)), na.rm = TRUE),
elderly_65p = rowSums(across(c(pop_65_69, pop_70_74, pop_75_79, pop_80p)), na.rm = TRUE)
